reason: fix verified: On the finding condition where list_workers() raises RuntimeError because pgrep is missing, times out, or fails, run() enters the try block, the exception is caught by except RuntimeError as e, a concise status failure is logged, and BaseCommand.FAILURE is returned instead of allowing the exception to escape; when discovery succeeds, the patched code continues to the empty-worker success path or logs each sorted worker row and returns success. (issue #178)
